title: Parse various SVA statements into XML netlist
body:
Hello,

I was thinking it would be useful to be able to output the netlist of the design after things like assertions and coverage are read. The main usefulness that I was thinking of was that another tool could take this file and convert it to a SMT solver's format to be able to do formal verification with verilator's parsing and elaboration. From what I can tell, the current XML output does not include assertions or assume statements. Please let me know if I am missing anything, and if anyone has any further documentation of the XML format besides the docs/xml.rst I would appreciate that as well.

Thank you,
Alex Maiorov
